elements.label: I2C Address
elements.tooltip: Set the I2C address of your LCD1602 (default is 0x27)

elements.label: Refresh Rate (ms)
elements.tooltip: Time between volume reads (lower = more responsive)

elements.label: Bar Orientation
elements.tooltip: Display bar layout (vertical mode coming soon)

elements.label: Enable Plugin
elements.tooltip: Toggle to enable or disable VU Meter output
